colors.name: void
colors.role: deepest layer — canvas sky top, floor falloff, ticker, taskbar, footer

colors.name: deep-purple
colors.role: page background — the mall after hours; every contrast figure below is measured against it

colors.name: panel
colors.role: retro window bodies; body text holds 14.3:1 on it, cyan 9.1:1, pink 7.0:1

colors.name: sunset-pink
colors.role: the accent — neon title, ON AIR, title bars, the SIGNAL LOST row (7.5:1, AA even for body)

colors.name: cyan
colors.role: grid light, schedule times, buttons, links, focus ring (9.9:1)

colors.name: mint
colors.role: live markers only — horizon glow, taskbar clock, the track on air (14.0:1)

colors.name: violet
colors.role: small labels, window borders, chrome (5.7:1 — passes AA, still kept off long copy)

colors.name: lavender-white
colors.role: reading text and hero stars (15.4:1) — the one color long copy is allowed to be

colors.name: haze
colors.role: secondary text — Korean glosses, captions, hints (10.0:1)

fonts.role: Latin neon display — the signage over the entrance; never used below display sizes
all Hangul — a retro Korean display voice; Hangul falls through the Latin faces into it
the broadcast console — labels, schedule, window chrome, and all reading text

texture: All texture is procedural: a DPR-capped 2D canvas draws the dusk sky, drifting star particles, a pink-to-violet sun sliced by widening venetian blinds, and the perspective grid floor (verticals converging on the vanishing point, horizontals projected as y = horizon + floorHeight * (0.92 / z)); the booth stage sits on a 32px repeating-linear-gradient tile grid; scroll velocity feeds a 0-to-1 energy that splits cyan/pink pseudo-element ghosts off every display heading (mix-blend-mode: screen, additive light only). All of it holds still under prefers-reduced-motion.

motion.name: ease-out-plaza
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) — reserved for entrances; chrome states snap

motion.name: scroll-energy attack / release
motion.value: 0.16 / 0.05 per 60fps-normalized frame; full energy at 2.4 px/ms scroll speed

motion.name: grid speed
motion.value: 0.5 lane-units/s at rest → +4.2 lane-units/s × energy at full rush

motion.name: aberration envelope
motion.value: ghost offset 0–7px, ghost opacity 0–0.85, both = f(energy)

motion.name: drag inertia
motion.value: release keeps pointer velocity, friction 0.9 per normalized frame, parks below 0.02 px/ms

motion.name: keyboard window step
motion.value: 24px per arrow press, 4px with Shift, Home respawns

motion.name: progress loop
motion.value: 292s linear scaleX(0→1), the length of the 4:52 song, forever
